vocab.meaning: tiếng gọi của định mệnh/nghề nghiệp xuất phát từ tâm nguyện
vocab.example: I've always felt that nursing was a calling rather than just a career choice, which led me to this major.

vocab.meaning: kế sinh nhai/nguồn thu nhập chính
vocab.example: While I enjoy the creative aspects, I chose Accounting because it's a reliable bread and butter profession in any economy.

vocab.meaning: có tố chất/phù hợp với cái gì
vocab.example: Since I was a child, my parents always said I was cut out for law because I loved debating every little detail.

vocab.meaning: điều đáng để suy ngẫm (khơi gợi sự lựa chọn)
vocab.example: A documentary I watched in high school gave me plenty of food for thought and eventually inspired me to study Environmental Science.

vocab.meaning: theo bước chân ai đó/nối nghiệp
vocab.example: Deciding to major in Medicine allowed me to follow in my father's footsteps and serve our local community.

vocab.meaning: chi tiết cụ thể/mọi khía cạnh từ trong ra ngoài
vocab.example: I chose Mechanical Engineering because I've always wanted to understand the ins and outs of how complex machinery functions.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí tiên phong/dẫn đầu
vocab.example: I opted for Biotechnology because I want to be at the forefront of medical innovation and drug discovery.
I felt that majoring in International Relations would truly broaden my horizons and help me understand global dynamics.

vocab.meaning: bàn đạp/bước đệm để đạt được mục tiêu cao hơn
vocab.example: I view this undergraduate degree in Psychology as a necessary stepping stone toward becoming a licensed clinical therapist.

vocab.meaning: thị trường ngách/lĩnh vực chuyên biệt
vocab.example: I specialized in Marine Archeology because it's a fascinating niche market with very few experts in my country.
